scripts.build: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && pagefind --site dist --force-language ja && bun run build-storybook
scripts.build-storybook: CI=1 STORYBOOK_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 storybook build --output-dir dist/storybook && rm -f dist/storybook/_headers
scripts.pages:create: wrangler pages project create nngn-dev --production-branch main
scripts.deploy:production: bun run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name nngn-dev --branch main
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name nngn-dev --branch preview
